prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The measurement record for Transformers (dry-type & pad-mount) shows the as-left reading inside the posted limit. The gauge or scale is readable, the setup is stable, and the same value is entered on the inspection form. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 450, 250.30.
title: Measurement check: Transformers (dry-type & pad-mount) (industrial site)
